title: rumohra carvifolia
intro: Rumohra carvifolia, also known as the leather fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and inflammation. The health benefits of Rumohra carvifolia include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and made into tea or infusions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
